SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2025 BY JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF JOHN POTTEBAUM APPEARED. DEFENDANT ANTHONY KOPP APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARCIA SITCOSKE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTTEBAUM, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOPP, ANTHONY SITCOSKE, MARCIA $1,095.97 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,140.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/16/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMRNT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (FORWARD TIME EXP RETURN TO SENDDER)
